title: Private Banking, Wealth and Conversational AI — Maybank–Ageas, Singapore
summary: Private banking, wealth, HNW, design-system, CMS, and conversational-AI work across Singapore and Asia Pacific.
claims: Joz worked across private banking, wealth/HNW, design systems, CMS, and conversational-AI related experience work for Maybank–Ageas Etiqa.
The programme connected enterprise delivery, wealth journeys, and ML-enabled customer experience.
proof_points: The broader Maybank proof includes 20× digital sales growth within 12 months.
The broader programme also includes 3,000+ wealth pilots and ML models for HNW and mass-market contexts.
source_notes: Grouped programme record. Quantified Maybank growth is referenced only through existing proof objects.
